headline: Sandy Fire Puts Edison International Wildfire Risks And Valuation In Focus
summary: Sandy Fire has broken out in Simi Valley, California during the current wildfire season. Fire activity has triggered forced evacuations in nearby communities. Edison International (NYSE:EIX), a key utility provider in the region, faces fresh questions about wildfire risk management and potential liabilities. Investors are reassessing operational exposure as the company responds to evolving fire conditions. Edison International, the parent of Southern California Edison, plays a central role...
